metadata.description: Shared skills marketplace for the ecom-business team. Skills are organized by functional domain.

plugins.name: general
plugins.description: General-purpose skills recommended for everyone on the team. Includes team-skills-browse, team-skills-update, and team-skills-add for installing and sharing skills without touching git or the /plugins command surface.

plugins.name: team-build-kit
plugins.description: The three-gate build lifecycle: memo (why) -> prd (what) -> build (how) -> ship (safe to rely on). For building tools you trust without being an engineer.

plugins.name: copywriting
plugins.description: Skills for copywriters. (Placeholder - awaiting first contribution.)

plugins.name: creative-strategy
plugins.description: Skills for creative strategists: brief-iteration, strategic-breakdown, hemingway-check. Owner: Kat Prefontaine.

plugins.name: clickup-operations
plugins.description: Skills for operating the team's shared ClickUp workspace (Ads Board, Client Catalogs, brief workflows): new-ad-idea, brief-template, top-lp. Owner: Spencer.

plugins.name: media-buying
plugins.description: Skills for media buyers. (Placeholder - awaiting first contribution.)
